name: Lmon.c4PftFrac
title: Percentage Cover by C4 Plant Functional Type
description: Percentage of entire grid cell  that is covered by C4 PFTs (including grass and crops).
processing note: Note that if this variable is independent of time, it should be stored only for a single time (user choice). CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Cell Methods - CMIP6:area: mean where land over all_area_types time: mean CMIP7:area: time: mean,
